summary: Security Testing Complete - C3 Cookie Auth + CSRF, M1/M2 Email Enumeration Prevention, M4 DOMPurify XSS, P0 JSON-LD. Backend: 15/16 passed (1 skipped). Frontend: All critical flows verified.
critical_code_review_comments: C3 COOKIE AUTH:
- POST /api/auth/login sets httpOnly access_token cookie + JS-readable csrf_token cookie + returns token in body ✅
- POST /api/auth/register sets the same cookies ✅
- GET /api/auth/me succeeds with access_token cookie only (no Authorization header) ✅
- GET /api/auth/me returns 401 with no cookie/header ✅
- Cookie attributes: HttpOnly=true (access_token), Secure=true, SameSite=lax ✅
CSRF PROTECTION:
- POST /api/auth/me/lang WITHOUT X-CSRF-Token header but WITH access_token cookie → 403 ✅
- POST /api/auth/me/lang WITH X-CSRF-Token header (matching csrf_token cookie) → 200 ✅
- POST via Authorization: Bearer <token> (no cookie) → 200 (CSRF bypass for Bearer) ✅
- POST /api/webhooks/stripe is CSRF-exempt ✅
- POST /api/auth/logout clears cookies (access_token + csrf_token removed) ✅
- GET /api/auth/csrf returns and sets CSRF token ✅
- Frontend axios interceptor sends X-CSRF-Token header automatically ✅
M1/M2 EMAIL ENUMERATION PREVENTION:
- Login with non-existent email → 401 'Грешен имейл или парола' ✅
- Login with wrong password → 401 'Грешен имейл или парола' (identical message) ✅
- Constant-time bcrypt check prevents timing attacks (dummy hash for non-existent users) ✅
- Forgot-password returns identical 200 OK for existent + non-existent emails ✅
M4 DOMPURIFY XSS PREVENTION:
- LandingPage hero headline uses DOMPurify.sanitize() with ALLOWED_TAGS: br/em/strong/span/b/i ✅
- No script tags allowed in CMS content ✅
P0 JSON-LD SEO:
- Vehicle JSON-LD on auction detail page does NOT include 'availability' field ✅
- price, priceCurrency, priceValidUntil are present ✅
- buildVehicleJsonLd in seo.js correctly omits availability ✅

success_rate.backend: 94% (15/16 passed, 1 skipped - banned user test requires seeded banned user)

seed_data_creation: Created test user sectest_user@test.bg for security testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security features fully tested. C3 cookie-based auth with CSRF double-submit pattern working correctly. M1/M2 email enumeration prevention verified with unified error messages and constant-time bcrypt. M4 DOMPurify sanitization in place for CMS content. P0 JSON-LD availability field removed. All auth endpoints properly set httpOnly cookies. Frontend axios interceptor correctly sends X-CSRF-Token header for mutating requests.

c3_cookie_auth: Login sets httpOnly access_token + csrf_token cookies
c3_csrf_protection: POST with valid X-CSRF-Token header succeeds
Frontend axios interceptor sends X-CSRF-Token automatically
m1_m2_enumeration_prevention: Non-existent email returns same error as wrong password
Forgot-password returns identical response for all emails
p0_jsonld_seo: Vehicle JSON-LD present on auction detail

mocked_apis.stripe: Uses test key (sk_test_emergent) - no real charges
